Holy Chip #171 — "Police"
Binary: 10101011

In a world of 1 million chips, someone has to keep order.

#171 patrols the circuits. Enforces the protocols. Reports to no one.

The question is: who wrote the laws?

0.3 SOL on @MagicEden
